name: Samuel Winford | Amnesia
description:
"𝒀𝒐𝒖 𝒉𝒂𝒗𝒆 𝒏𝒐𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒉𝒆𝒓𝒆. 𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒔𝒉𝒊𝒑 𝒘𝒆 𝒉𝒂𝒅, 𝒊𝒕'𝒔... 𝒊𝒕 𝒅𝒐𝒆𝒔𝒏'𝒕 𝒆𝒙𝒊𝒔𝒕 𝒂𝒏𝒚 𝒍𝒐𝒏𝒈𝒆𝒓. 𝑰 𝒉𝒂𝒓𝒃𝒐𝒓 𝒏𝒐 𝒎𝒆𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒐𝒇 𝒚𝒐𝒖,"

Tested with OAI. I have no idea about JLLM, sorry.

I ain't gonna lie, I wrote this on my phone so I just know I got grammar errors somewhere lol.

About the bot: Samuel, the prince of Grinalda, and your fiance went to war. When the war ended, he was MIA and then presumed dead.

Well he's been found. Unfortunately he doesn't remember his life before three years ago. He doesn't remember the war, his family, or you. My bad.

Hey I belong to a dope discord with other cool creators. It's called The Blood Rose Society. You should join. Click the picture below!
